news.title: Stablecoin yield in crypto Clarity Act won't allow rewards on balances, latest text says
news.summary: The crypto industry got a first look at legislative language that won't allow rewards on stablecoin balances, and the approach is seen as restrictive.

news.title: Bitcoin holds above $70,000, but future direction hinges on Iran-U.S. 'talks'
news.summary: Cryptos bounced on Trump’s five-day pause announcement, but the next move hinges on whether tensions between the U.S. and Iran ease or spiral, a Wintermute trader said.

news.title: Solana Foundation targets institutions with new privacy framework
news.summary: The organization argued that the next phase of crypto adoption will depend less on transparency alone and more on giving companies control over what they reveal — and to whom.
